title: Fiddle
description: At the start of each turn, draw [blue]2[/blue] additional cards. You may not draw cards during your turn.
flavor: [red]Details for this relic will be revealed in the future...[/red]
notes: Adds 2 cards to hand draw at turn start via ModifyHandDrawLate. ShouldDraw returns false only during the owner's turn on the current side, preventing all regular card draws during their turn. Forced draws (fromHandDraw=true) still occur.
